basicDetails.schemeName: Various Training and Support Schemes of Kisan Vigyan Kendra - Veer Chandra Singh Garhwali Uttarakhand University of Horticulture and Forestry
basicDetails.implementingAgency: Veer Chandra Singh Garhwali Uttarakhand University Of Horticulture And Forestry, Uttarakhand

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Various Training and Support Schemes of Kisan Vigyan Kendra” is implemented by the Veer Chandra Singh Garhwali Uttarakhand University of Horticulture and Forestry under the Department of Horticulture, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to enhance the knowledge, skills, and productivity of farmers in Uttarakhand by providing them with the latest technical training in agriculture, horticulture, and forestry.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Kisan Vigyan Kendra provides farmers with the latest technical training in agriculture, forestry, and horticulture, along with improved seeds and plant varieties.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the knowledge, skills, and productivity of farmers in Uttarakhand by providing them with the latest technical training in agriculture, horticulture, and forestry.

children.text: The “Various Training and Support Schemes of Kisan Vigyan Kendra” is implemented by the Veer Chandra Singh Garhwali Uttarakhand University of Horticulture and Forestry under the Department of Horticulture, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to enhance the knowledge, skills, and productivity of farmers in Uttarakhand by providing them with the latest technical training in agriculture, horticulture, and forestry.
Kisan Vigyan Kendra provides farmers with the latest technical training in agriculture, forestry, and horticulture, along with improved seeds and plant varieties.

From time to time, the Krishi Vigyan Kendra contacts farmers and provides training through various programmes, as well as shares information through different media to promote improved seeds and plant varieties.

applicationProcess.process_md: From time to time, the Krishi Vigyan Kendra contacts farmers and provides training through various programmes, as well as shares information through different media to promote improved seeds and plant varieties.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. All farmers in Uttarakhand are eligible to receive the benefits.

children.text: All farmers in Uttarakhand are eligible to receive the benefits.
